dict.string: MPPEM[ ] /* MeasurePixelPerEm */ PUSHB[ ] /* 1 value pushed */ 200 LTEQ[ ] /* LessThenOrEqual */ MPPEM[ ] /* MeasurePixelPerEm */ PUSHB[ ] /* 1 value pushed */ 7 GTEQ[ ] /* GreaterThanOrEqual */ AND[ ] /* LogicalAnd */ IF[ ] /* If */ PUSHW[ ] /* 2 values pushed */ 1 511 SCANCTRL[ ] /* ScanConversionControl */ SCANTYPE[ ] /* ScanType */ EIF[ ] /* EndIf */
PUSHB[ ] /* 1 value pushed */ 0 FDEF[ ] /* FunctionDefinition */ PUSHB[ ] /* 1 value pushed */ 0 POP[ ] /* PopTopStack */ ENDF[ ] /* EndFunctionDefinition */
